subtasks.description: Query spend warehouse to calculate current month spend and 3-month rolling average by vendor/category, compute variance ratios, and identify outliers for anomaly detection.
Classify identified spend anomalies into normal_variance, concerning, or critical buckets based on variance thresholds, trend direction, and historical volatility patterns.

plan.cost_rationale: 2 subtasks: (1) spend_analysis as sql_gen (mid tier) because multi-table spend joins with window functions (LAG for rolling average, variance calculation) require mid-tier SQL capability; (2) anomaly_classification as cross_recon (mid tier) because it takes the SQL output and applies classification logic against thresholds—this reconciles computed metrics against classification rules and is best handled by cross_recon's decision-making capability. Both tasks are necessary and minimal. No policy_action needed because classification is heuristic-based (variance thresholds), not policy governance. No multitool_plan needed because the work is SQL + logic, not multi-tool orchestration.

output.sql: SELECT vendor_name, current_month_spend, avg_3month, CASE WHEN avg_3month = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND((current_month_spend - avg_3month) / avg_3month * 100, 2) END AS variance_pct, CASE WHEN avg_3month = 0 THEN 'new_vendor' WHEN current_month_spend = 0 THEN 'no_activity' WHEN avg_3month = 0 THEN 'new_vendor' WHEN ABS(current_month_spend - avg_3month) / avg_3month <= 0.10 THEN 'normal_variance' WHEN ABS(current_month_spend - avg_3month) / avg_3month <= 0.25 THEN 'concerning' ELSE 'critical' END AS anomaly_classification, current_month_spend - avg_3month AS spend_delta FROM (SELECT vendor_name, SUM(CASE WHEN invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month' THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS current_month_spend, AVG(monthly_total) AS avg_3month FROM (SELECT vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date) AS invoice_month, SUM(amount_usd) AS monthly_total FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months' AND invoice_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY vendor_name, DATE_TRUNC('month', invoice_date)) AS monthly_spend GROUP BY vendor_name) AS vendor_summary ORDER BY ABS(current_month_spend - avg_3month) DESC NULLS LAST
